speaker: Seeker
text: Subah termination email dekha aur dimaag sunn ho gaya, par rone ka time nahi hai kyunki agle mahine ki home loan EMI ka sawal hai. Papa ne kisan hokar apni life savings meri engineering par laga di thi, isliye main thak kar baith nahi sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty and role frame first to validate the Seeker's burden.
text: Tumhare upar EMI aur Papa ke sacrifice ka itna bada bojh hai, ki is waqt thakne ya rukne ki ijazat hi nahi mil rahi khud se.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Mere liye breakdown ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakti, mujhe bas ek machine ki tarah naya job dhoondna hai taaki ghar ki izzat bachi rahe. Gaon me waise hi ladkiyo ki padhai pe baatein banate hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence regarding the family's honor.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki ek choti si bhi galti ya rukawat gaon mein parivar ki izzat aur unke faisle par sawal utha degi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh darr hai. Log kahenge isko padhaya hi kyun. Main failure nahi ban sakti. Agar kisi ko bataya layoff ke baare me toh bohot badi taane sunne padenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue with a shorter restatement and soft pause.
text: Logon ke taane aur failure ka tag lagne ka darr tumhe yeh sab akele andar dabane par majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main sach me bahut thak gayi hoon. Subah se resume update karne ki koshish kar rahi hoon, par screen dekh kar ajeeb si thakawat aur ghabrahat ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently probe the physical toll of this constant duty without shifting from the Seeker's reality.
text: Jab tum resume le kar baithti ho aur yeh saari zimmedariyaan saamne aati hain, toh us ghabrahat mein kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai saans atak jaati hai. EMI due date ek bomb ki tarah lagti hai jo tick tick kar raha hai. Mere paas koi backup nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and weight of the effort to validate exhaustion.
text: Itne time se lagatar bina kisi backup ke chalte rehna, aur ab yeh EMI ka countdown, tumhe ek dum corner me push kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Aur iske baavjood rone ka time nahi hai. Mujhe strong banna hi hoga, ghar walo ko bata nahi sakti jab tak dusra job haath me na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the exhaustion underneath the duty-based coping pattern.
text: Lagta hai ki is strong banne ke dabaav ne tumhe gehri tarah se thaka diya hai, EXHAUSTION itni zyada hai ki andar se tootne ka darr lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, exhausted toh hoon. Par hum middle-class job walo ke paas option hi kya hai? Salary aati hai tabiyat theek, ruk gayi toh sab zero.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the structural reality of the Hindi belt middle class without toxic positivity.
text: Corporate market me aur middle-class parivaron me sach me poori zindagi salary pe tiki hoti hai, tumhara yeh bojh mehsoos karna bilkul natural hai, tumhari mehnat aur koshish ki value ek email aane se kam nahi ho jati.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par bank waale aur gaon ki panchayat ko meri value thodi dikhegi. Unhe toh paisa aur status chahiye. Ye pressure sach me maar dega mujhe ek din.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote to normalize the Seeker's experience in their cultural context.
text: Humare yahan, jo bacche ghar ka bojh uthate hain unke sath aisi achanak corporate layoffs bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki izzat aur loan ka masla beech mein aa jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe hain. Thoda sa light feel hua ki ye sirf meri failure nahi hai. Par aage ka kya? Mujhe job chahiye taaki next month ka issue na ho. Batao kya karoon abhi, dimaag kaam nahi kar raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide structural normalization about the financial pressure and panic.
text: Achanak se jab income rukti hai aur karz saamne hota hai, toh dimaag ka blank hona ek dam natural response hai, yeh financial system hi aise design hota hai ki hume panic mein daal de.

speaker: Seeker
text: Toh is panic se bahar aakar ek machine ki tarah waapas track pe kaise aau? Mujhe kal subah se interviews line up karne honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 manageable suggestions that don't add to the Seeker's obligations.
text: Abhi ke liye do chhoti cheezein kar sakte hain. Ek, agle aadhe ghante ke liye laptop band kar do aur sirf paani peekar shanti se baith jao. Doosra, apni bank app me 'EMI grace period' ya moratorium check kar lo, shayad usse ek mahine ka extension mil jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: EMI grace period? Haan, shayad mere loan agreement me kuch aisa ho. Agar 1 mahine ki mohlat mili toh tension aadhi ho jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk the Seeker through the execution of one specific, small step.
text: Pehle ek lamba saans lo... phir apne phone pe bank ki app kholo aur FAQ me 'EMI pause' search karo, bas itna hi aaj ke liye, resume kal dekh lenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, main check kar rahi hoon. Haan, ek request form dikh raha hai online portal pe. Thank god, main kal subah isko submit kar dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror back the newfound space and mild relief.
text: Yeh ek extension ka option milne se jo darr tha sab kuch ek saath toot jane ka, woh thoda kam hota hua mehsoos ho raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot kam hua hai. Sach me. Mujhe laga tha mera game over ho gaya aaj hi. Par abhi ladaai baaki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe how the Seeker will manage their energy now that the immediate panic has reduced slightly.
text: Ab jab thoda sa saans lene ka waqt mila hai, toh is raat mein apni is thakawat ka khayal kaise rakhogi bina resume ki tension liye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghar waalo ko phone nahi karungi warna aawaz se unhe pata chal jayega ki kuch gadbad hai. Bas chup chap kuch kha kar so jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma/secrecy cue with a softer restatement and pause.
text: Unhe chinta se bachane ke liye tum apni pareshani apni aawaz me chupana chahti ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main strong hi dikhna chahti hoon. Jab offer letter haath me hoga naya, tabhi baat karungi unse. Tab tak ye duty akele hi nibhani hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror back their ongoing core duty-based priority.
text: Tumhara apne parivar ke prati farz tumhe andar se himmat de raha hai ki is mushkil daur ko tum akele hi paar kar logi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main network me purane manager ko kal LinkedIn pe reach out karungi. Ab thoda clear lag raha hai dimaag aapse baat karne ke baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide mild reassurance regarding networking under pressure.
text: Aajkal tech industry mein purane colleagues aur managers se referrals mangna sabse zaroori aur practical kadam hota hai aisi situations mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main kal 3-4 logo ko message daal dungi. Aaj raat ke liye bas thodi shanti aur nind chahiye. Kal fresh start karni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror back the recurring coping shade about not having time to rest, but now positively framed.
text: Ab thoda sa thehrav aur ek raat ki nind tumhe aane wale kal ki bhag-daud ke liye tayyar karegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bahut zyada darkar hai aaj neend ki. Varna machine ki oiling ruk jayegi aur subah uth nahi paungi kaam ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate their resilience and ability to pause.
text: Baat karke apni is thakawat ko sweekar karna aur apne dimaag ko thoda rest dene ka faisla lena, sach me ek bahut badi samajhdari hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapse baat karke halka laga, warna subah se akele andar hi andar ghut rahi thi. Thank you mujhe sunne ke liye bina judge kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a simple supportive question to close the interaction comfortably.
text: Is raat araam karne se pehle kya koi aur aisi chinta hai jo andar dab rahi ho aur tum share karna chaho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi, abhi ke liye bas kaafi hai. Main bas laptop band karke sone jaa rahi hoon. EMI extension ka try kal subah pehla kaam hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validating mirror to close the loop.
text: Chalo, is raat ko bina kisi aur darr aur tension ke bas thodi der shanti mehsoos karne ki koshish karo apne araam mein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon
text: Layoff ka email aaya hai startup se, par main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon. WFH isolation mein akela chup-chap baitha naye portals par kaam dhoond raha hoon taaki ghar walon ko pata na chale.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the Seeker's core duty frame to show they are heard before exploring the hidden emotional toll.
text: Sunkar samajh aa raha hai ki sabse bada focus abhi ghar walon ko bacha kar rakhne par hai, kyunki tum apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed ho aur yeh bojh akele utha rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, agar unko pata chala toh sab bikhar jayega. Vehicle loan ki kist aane wali hai. Agar default hua aur bank walo ne gaon mein phone kiya, toh log kya kahenge? I can't let that happen.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly name the implied fear of social consequences and family shame in their village.
text: Tumhe is baat ki bohot fikar hai ki EMI miss hone se gaon mein baat phel jayegi aur parivaar ki izzat par sawal uthega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon
text: Izzat hi toh sab kuch hai humare liye. Main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon, agar meri naukri gayi toh unka survival mushkil ho jayega. Raat bhar neend nahi aati yahi soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlight the continuous duration of their physical and mental toll from hiding this secret.
text: Aise lagatar raat bhar jaag kar aur akele is secrecy ko maintain karte hue kaafi waqt guzar raha hai, jo tumhe physically tod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahoon toh thakan itni hai ki sharir jawab de raha hai. Par mere paas rukne ka option nahi hai. Structural endurance hi meri reality ban gayi hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt the Seeker to reflect on how they are forcing themselves to function despite the physical crash.
text: Jab sharir bilkul sath chhodne lagta hai, tab is 'structural endurance' ko push karne ke liye tum akele kamre mein kya karte ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon
text: Karna padta hai. Screen ke saamne baith kar bus apply karta rehta hoon. Kabhi darr ke maare rona aata hai, par main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon, toh aansu rok leta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed exhaustion that comes from forcefully suppressing their own emotions for the sake of duty.
text: Lagta hai ki is 'aakhri umeed' wale role ne tumhe itna thaka diya hai ki tum apne rone ka haq bhi kho chuke ho, aur sirf andar hi andar ek gehri EXHAUSTION mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul waisa hi lagta hai. Kabhi lagta hai kash koi ek din ke liye mere shoulders se yeh responsibility le le. I just want a break from this constant fear.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate their need for a break as completely normal given their background and the pressure of WFH isolation.
text: Yeh thakan aur break chahne ki feeling bilkul jayaz hai. Gaon se aakar shaher mein WFH aur EMI manage karna aasaan nahi hai, aur job jana tumhari mehnat ya value kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: I know, but society doesn't see it that way. Rishtedar aur gaon wale sirf success dekhte hain. Mere paas fail hone ka margin hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize layoffs in the startup ecosystem using the mandatory cultural disclosure template.
text: MNCs aur startups mein layoff ka pattern bahut common hai aajkal — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki society mein failure ko le kar stigma hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh. Agar failure ka thappa lag gaya toh gaon mein muh kaise dikhaunga? Logon ke taane aur baatein mujhe chain se jeene nahi denge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a soft, short relational restatement ending in a pause.
text: Logon ke taano ka darr itna bada hai ki usne tumhein is isolation mein aur bhi zyada akela kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... yeh akelepan sach mein suffocate kar raha hai. Ab dimaag blank ho raha hai, samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, ab kya karoon main? Please koi practical raasta batao.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 simple options matching their role and duty frame that take less than 10 minutes.
text: Hum isko chote steps mein tod sakte hain. Ek, apni PF aur current savings ka hisaab lagana taaki agle EMIs ka clear plan bane, ya do, apne purane trusted colleagues se secretly reach out karna new leads ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Savings toh account mein hain, par EMIs ka exact calculation maine darr ke maare kiya hi nahi. Colleagues ko message karne mein thodi jhijhak lag rahi hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide the Seeker through calculating their financial runway step-by-step.
text: Toh sharam ko side rakhte hain aur pehle calculation karte hain. Pehle ek paper par current savings likho... phir next 2 months ki basic need aur EMI likho... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, banking app khol kar balance dekh raha hoon. It's around 1.5 lakhs. EMI 15k ki hai, toh technically expenses mila kar bhi mere paas 4-5 months ka buffer hai. Wait, seriously?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the layoff structurally and highlight how knowing their runway removes the immediate panic.
text: Dekho, yeh financial runway hai. Startups mein funding cycles ke kaaran layoffs system ka hissa hain, yeh tumhari individual failure nahi hai, aur is buffer se tumhe bina panic ke agla step plan karne ka waqt milega.

speaker: Seeker
text: I never calculated this properly. Darr ke maare bas worst-case scenario chal raha tha dimaag mein ki agle mahine hi bank wale gaon jayenge aur sab khatam ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how fear of the worst-case consequence clouded their logical thinking.
text: Dimaag ne us worst-case darr ko itna bada bana diya tha ki actual numbers par dhyaan dena aur relief mehsoos karna namumkin ho gaya tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon
text: Exactly. Parivaar ka bojh itna bhaari hai ki logical soch band ho jaati hai. Main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon, yeh tag kabhi dimaag se nikalta hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how the constant burden of this identity makes the situation feel like an endless exhaustion.
text: Mujhe lagta hai is tag ki wajah se jo dabaav aur EXHAUSTION tumne lamba time face kiya hai, usne har choti problem ko ek life-or-death crisis bana diya tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa hi tha. Par ab yeh buffer dekh kar thoda sa saans lene ka mauka lag raha hai. Mujhe ab apne resume aur network par dhyaan dena chahiye na?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide safe next steps for networking that respect their need for privacy.
text: Bilkul, hum do cheezein kar sakte hain. Apna resume update karke key highlights add karna, ya LinkedIn par 'Open to Work' quietly turn on karna jisse sirf recruiters ko pata chale.

speaker: Seeker
text: Quiet mode on karna sahi rahega. Main nahi chahta ki meri feed par layoff ki public post jaaye. Usse gaon mein kisi na kisi ko pata chalne ka risk hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror their ongoing commitment to duty by protecting their family's peace of mind.
text: Tumhari priority abhi bhi family ki peace aur us secrecy ko sensibly maintain karna hai taaki jab tak job na mile, unhe koi aanch na aaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. Tab tak definitely nahi bataunga jab tak nayi naukri nahi mil jaati. Us structural endurance ki abhi aur zaroorat padegi, but the difference is, ab panic thoda kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate their courage in facing the numbers despite WFH isolation.
text: Aur yeh calculation karna tumhari pragmatism dikhata hai. WFH akelepan mein chup-chap darr sehne ke bajaye tumne facts ka saamna kiya, yeh sach mein himmat ka kaam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Mujhe lagta tha ki main weak padh raha hoon kyunki baar-baar rona aata tha in pichle kuch dino mein. Par shayad main sach mein bas overworked tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe of their perceived weakness as a natural reaction to isolation and tech industry stress.
text: Startup culture ki uncertainty aur akelepan ka yeh combination sabse mazboot insaan ko bhi thaka sakta hai. Yeh weakness nahi hai, bas us extreme heavy load ka ek natural reaction tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: True. Abhi soch raha hoon ek ex-manager ko informal message drop karun? Unse ache terms the mere aur shayad unke paas backend roles ki lead ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt them to mentally draft the message to reduce any lingering hesitation.
text: Yeh ek bohot acha step hai. Tum us ex-manager ko message mein kya likhna chahte ho jisse professional boundary ke sath tum comfortable bhi feel karo?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main likhunga: 'Hi Sir, hope you're doing well. I am currently exploring new roles in backend dev. Let me know if your network has any openings.' Simple aur to-the-point.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the clarity and professional strength in their chosen action.
text: Ek sidha aur clear message, jisme tum bina kisi jhijhak ke purane connection ka sahi tarah se use kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, send kar diya. WFH desk par baith kar itne din baad ek ajeeb sa sukoon mil raha hai. Ab main apne resume format ko update karne lagta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close the interaction by affirming their capability and the positive shift from paralysis to structured action.
text: Yeh sukoon dekh kar mujhe bhi bahut shanti mili. Tumne worst-case ke dar se nikal kar practical action liya hai, aur is nayi job search journey ke liye tum poori tarah kabil ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai
text: MNC se nikaale jaane ke baad bank balance zero dikh raha hai, par main bache huye remittance se kisi tarah agle mahine ki EMI manage karne ki koshish kar raha hoon. Chit fund mein Papa ke paise doobne ke baad saara bojh mere kandhon par hai, isliye main rone ke bajaye din-raat upskilling kar raha hoon. Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai, isliye main bas endure kar raha hoon taaki ghar ka chula chalta rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the Seeker's core duty frame (Lens B) to validate their focus on responsibilities.
text: Tumhari priority bas yehi hai ki ghar ka chula chalta rahe aur EMI miss na ho, kyunki iss waqt parivaar ki zimmedari aur farz tumhare liye sabse aage hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur sach kahoon toh it is physically draining. I sit in front of the laptop applying for jobs and studying all day. Raat tak aankhein aur dimaag dono jalne lagte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and physical toll of the struggle (Lens D) to show presence.
text: Itne waqt se tum bina ruke apni health ko side karke screens ke saamne baithe ho, bas kisi tarah ek nayi job jaldi secure karne ki umeed mein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai
text: Agar ek din bhi break liya toh lagta hai I am failing them. EMI ki due date har din paas aa rahi hai. Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai, toh I just gulp down the stress aur laga rehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe the emotional weight underneath the continuous working cycle.
text: Yeh exhaustion aur bina ruke chalne ki majboori... khud ko lagataar itna push karte hue tumhe andar se kaisa feel ho raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Helpless lagta hai yaar. Raat ko neend nahi aati, bas calculations dimaag mein chalte rehte hain. Market abhi itna slow hai, koi calls nahi aa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the unspoken fear of funds depleting before finding a job (Lens E).
text: Neend mein bhi wohi EMI aur savings ki calculations chalna... kahin na kahin ek darr baith gaya hai ki nayi job jaldi nahi mili toh savings khatam hone ke baad ghar kaise chalega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi darr kha raha hai mujhe. Ghar walo ko pura sach bataya bhi nahi hai maine. Unhe lagta hai mere paas savings hain. But I am literally running on empty.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational dynamic of hiding the truth to protect the family (Lens C).
text: Family ko sach isliye nahi bataya kyunki tum unhe achanak ek aur tension nahi dena chahte, aur akele hi is reality ko shield kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai
text: Exactly. Papa waise hi chit fund wale loss ke baad se weak ho gaye hain. Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai, I can't let them see I am breaking inside.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role/duty frame of being the strong son carrying the burden (Lens B).
text: Unko shield karna aur akele ye saara financial aur mental pressure uthana... tum sach mein ek zimmedar bete ka role poori tarah nibha rahe ho, chahe andar se kitna bhi heavy lage.

speaker: Seeker
text: Zimmedar beta hone ka cost bahut high lag raha hai aaj kal. Main bas 28 ka hoon. Doston ki life aur unki trips dekhta hoon toh aur suffocation hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the contrast between peers' lives and Seeker's reality to uncover the core conflict.
text: Jab tum doston ki settled life dekhte ho aur khud ko iss lagataar hustle mein paate ho, toh apne aage ke raaste ke baare mein kya khayal aate hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai
text: Lagta hai main bas ek ATM machine banke reh gaya hoon, I feel so trapped. Par phir wahi cycle chalti hai, mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai, toh main bas silent rehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect EXHAUSTION since C4/C5 + Duty_Based coping points to extreme burnout.
text: Lagta hai ki yeh lagaatar ATM machine bane rehne ki expectation aur apni needs ko mita dene ka pressure tumhe mentally aur physically bilkul exhaust kar chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes... completely exhausted. Subah uthne ka mann nahi karta, system on karne se pehle nausea hota hai. But apply toh karna hi padega na jobs ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the exhaustion as normal given the heavy burden of MNC layoff and family financial security.
text: Yeh exhaustion bilkul jayaz hai. Tum akele MNC layoff jaisi tough reality ke baad poore ghar ka financial bojh utha rahe ho. Tumhari mehnat aur tumhari value uss bank balance se kahin zyada hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks man. Ghar pe koi samjhega nahi. 'Beta IT mein hai toh sab sorted hai' wali baat hai. Aur sach kahu toh, kisi aur ko batane mein bohot sharam aati hai ki mere paas ab paise nahi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a short restatement ending with a soft pause, focusing on the isolation of keeping the facade (Lens C).
text: Dusron ki nazron mein successful dikhna aur asal mein financial struggle akele hi sehte rehna... yeh sab andar hi andar kitna akela kar deta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot akela. Mere paas ek choti si emergency fund thi, wo bhi Papa ke last medical bill mein chali gayi. Ab sach mein zero pe hoon. Pata nahi kab tak chalega ye sab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote normalizing the hidden struggles of IT professionals.
text: Private sector aur IT roles mein working professionals ke saath yeh akele struggle karne ka pattern bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki society ne ek 'sorted life' ka tag laga diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly! Wahi tag meri jaan le raha hai. Mujhe sach mein kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, tum hi batao ab kya karoon main? It is becoming too much to handle alone.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, actionable steps since the readiness signal is present and intensity is 2.
text: Jab itna overwhelming lag raha ho, toh do chote practical kadam try kar sakte hain. Ya toh agle mahine ke expenses ka ek basic audit list bana lo, ya phir din mein 15 minute job portals band karke simply thoda walk kar lo dimaag shaant karne ke liye. Kya feasible lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Walk par jaane ka toh time nahi milta, but expenses ki list main bana sakta hoon. Dimaag mein sab jumbled up hai abhi, numbers confuse kar rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide Seeker step-by-step to create the financial list for clarity.
text: Bilkul. Pehle ek paper aur pen lo... phir usme sirf agle tees din ke zaroori kharche aur EMI ka amount likh lo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, that sounds doable. At least exact deficit pata chal jayega toh main EMI manage karne ke liye doston se short-term borrow karne ka soch sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the EMI and sudden layoff pressure as a structural market reality, not a personal failure.
text: Ek system ke taur pe, achanak layoffs aur uske baad EMI structures ka in-built pressure ek harsh economic reality hai, yeh tumhari koi personal kami nahi hai. Tum bas uss shock ko practically navigate kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai
text: Logically samajh aata hai, but emotionally saara blame main khud pe dalta hoon. Main bas chahta hoon jaldi sab sort ho jaye. Mera farz meri personal takleef se bada hai, toh rukne ka option hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how relying on the duty frame is the only thing keeping them standing (Lens B).
text: Yeh ek line aur family ka dhyaan rakhne ki zimmedari hi abhi tumhara sabse bada sahara bani hui hai iss tough situation mein aage badhte rehne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aur breakdown main afford nahi kar sakta kyunki agle mahine chote bhai ki college fees due hai. It's just a never ending cycle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the fear of dropping the ball for the younger brother (Lens E).
text: Agar tum toot gaye toh chote bhai ki fees aur uski aage ki padhai ka kya hoga, yeh darr tumhe shayad apne liye rone bhi nahi deta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. But honestly, kisi se ye sab openly bolke thoda light feel ho raha hai. I realize I have been holding my breath for weeks.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate their resilience in carrying this burden and acknowledge the relief of venting.
text: Mahinon tak apni saans rok kar, akele doosron ka dhyaan rakhna aasan nahi hai. Tumhari yeh lagataar koshish aur apni family ke liye itna sacrifice sach mein bohot badi baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks. Main aaj raat baith kar wo expenses ki sheet banata hoon. Phir maybe bank se baat karke loan moratorium ke baare mein poochunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Give clear, simple options for contacting the bank.
text: Bank se baat karna ek acha aur practical kadam ho sakta hai. Tum unke helpline pe moratorium ke liye call kar sakte ho, ya apne branch manager ko seedha email daal sakte ho. Dono options valid hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main pehle email hi daalunga. Written record bhi rahega aur mujhe apni situation clear words mein explain karne ka time bhi mil jayega bina ghabraye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the proactive step taken and the sense of control it brings (Lens D).
text: Email ke through baat rakhne se situation ko thoda apne timeline par aur organized tareeqe se handle karne ka sense wapas mil raha hai tumhe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. Wahi thoda sa control missing tha. Plan clear hoga toh kam se kam EMI ki chinta aaj raat neend kharab nahi karegi utna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a closing systemic reframe about navigating financial crunches in MNC life.
text: Financial setbacks aur EMI cycles MNC employees ke beech bohot normal structural pressure points hain. Yeh list banana aur email draft karna uss badi uncertainty ke beech ek practical grip maintain karne ka sabse behtar tareeqa hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe har haal mein pathar ban kar khade rehna hai
text: Aaj subah hi termination letter mila aur ab agle mahine ka EMI bounce hone ka pura darr hai. Tier-2 city mein baithe Maa-Baap ne sahukaar se karz lekar meri shuruat karwayi thi. Main thak kar haar nahi maan sakta, mujhe har haal mein pathar ban kar khade rehna hai. Mere paas in sab negative thoughts ke liye waqt nahi hai, parivaar ki 'shaan' bachani hai bas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duty and role expectation to validate his immediate pressure to not break down (Lens B).
text: Tumhare upar is waqt itni badi zimmedari hai ki apna dukh mehsoos karne ka bhi waqt nahi mil raha tumhe, kyunki parivaar ki shaan sabse aage hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Unhe lagta hai unka beta badi MNC mein well-settled hai. Sahukaar ka interest rate itna high hai ki agar maine ek bhi payment miss ki, toh gaon mein unki naak katt jayegi. Mera career baad mein aata hai, unki izzat pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the underlying fear of what happens to his family's reputation if the EMI stops (Lens E).
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki sabse bada darr yeh termination nahi hai, balki yeh khauf hai ki EMI rukne se gaon mein jo izzat hai, woh bikhar jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe har haal mein pathar ban kar khade rehna hai
text: Haan, default ka notice aaya toh unki health bigad jayegi. Mera apna survival secondary hai abhi. Main andar se completely drained hoon, neend nahi aati, par mujhe har haal mein pathar ban kar khade rehna hai. Koi option hi nahi hai mere paas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting reflection on the internal toll of strictly adhering to duty without space for processing.
text: Jab tum khud ko is tarah bina ruke, apne emotions ko dabakar chalne par majboor karte ho, toh andar ki thakaan ka kya hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakaan toh aisi hai ki body ache hone lagta hai, screen dekhta hoon toh chest heavy lagti hai. Par main in cheezon mein time waste nahi kar sakta. Next job dhundhni hai, savings bas thodi si hai. Mujhe bas execute karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledged the prolonged timeline of his financial sacrifice since his career started (Lens D).
text: Pichle kuch saalon se tum lagataar ek fixing mode mein chal rahe ho, ek ke baad ek target poora karte hue, apni physical health ko completely sideline karke.

speaker: Seeker
text: College ke aakhiri saal se jab unhone pehli baar bada karz liya tha, tab se meri life EMI aur inhi targets ke aas-paas ghoom rahi hai. Aisa lagta hai main koi beta nahi, bas ek EMI pay karne wali machine ban gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational dynamic where he feels reduced to a financial provider for his parents (Lens C).
text: Maa-baap ka sapna aur karz chukane ki zimmedari ne tumhara apne hi parivaar ke sath rishta bas ek financial transaction jaisa bana diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe har haal mein pathar ban kar khade rehna hai
text: Sach bolun toh haan. Par phir unhone meri padhai ke liye apni zindagi ki saari savings laga di thi. Toh gussa karne ka koi haq nahi hai mujhe. Isliye mujhe har haal mein pathar ban kar khade rehna hai, unke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting the seeker to explore the breaking point between his profound exhaustion and his rigid duty.
text: Kya tumhe kabhi aisa lagta hai ki is 'shaan' aur ehsaan ko akele uthate uthate, tum khud bilkul tootne ki kagaar par aa gaye ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj subah se laptop ke aage blank baitha hoon. Nayee jobs ke liye apply karne ki himmat hi nahi ho rahi. I am just so tired. Ek taraf duty hai jo rukne nahi de rahi, aur doosri taraf lag raha hai jaise ab ek kadam aage nahi badhaya jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Named the deep exhaustion hiding beneath his duty-based coping mechanism as he named his core conflict.
text: Lagta hai is lagataar bojh aur expectations ne tumhe andar se poori tarah thaka diya hai, ek deep exhaustion hai jo ab aur ignore nahi ki ja rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul yahi hai. Par main kisi ko ye sab bata nahi sakta. Ek mard ko hamesha strong dikhna padta hai family ke aage, weak pad gaya toh log kya kahenge, meri saari izzat chali jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirrored the stigma and gender expectation forcing him to hide his exhaustion, pausing to give space.
text: Ek mard hone ka pressure tumhe apni yeh thakaan sabse chhupane par majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Lighter lag raha hai thoda accept karke yahan par. Main sach mein itne dinon se ek fake strong mask pehan kar chal raha tha. Reality ye hai ki corporate layoffs meri galti nahi hain, par bhugatna mujhe pad raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated his feelings as culturally normal for Tier-2 breadwinners, separating his worth from the job outcome.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tech industry mein toh wese hi itne log nikal rahe hain har din. Main aaj subah se sirf khud ko blame kar raha tha ki kaash maine aur over-time kiya hota, par shayad mere control mein tha hi nahi sab kuch.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shared a brief systemic anecdote about the IT sector to normalize the structural reality and reduce his personal guilt.
text: Corporate world mein achanak layoffs ka yeh pattern aajkal bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin log aapas mein is baare mein baat nahi karte kyunki sab apni shaan aur success image maintain karna chahte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. MNCs ke liye hum sirf numbers hain. Jab chahe cost-cutting ke naam par nikal dete hain. Par us sach ko jankar bhi mere ghar ki EMI aur sahukaar ka pressure toh gayab nahi ho jata.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected his shift towards recognizing systemic issues while validating the persistent external pressure.
text: Lagta hai ab tum is blaming cycle se bahar nikal kar reality ko dekh paa rahe ho, halanki woh financial urgency ka bhoj abhi bhi bilkul waise hi sar par khada hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Ab theek hona padega. Mere paas breakdown afford karne ka waqt nahi hai. Ab kya karoon? Mujhe is situation ko tackle karna hai par kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe to normalize the next logical steps without adding personal failure stigma.
text: Job market ki ye reality hai ki aisi situations mein immediate focus sirf buffer create karne pe hota hai, aur companies/banks bhi aise transitions ko process karne ke liye options rakhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered practical, low-effort options to manage the immediate financial fear without adding new obligations.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected how taking a small step mitigates the catastrophic fear associated with defaulting (Lens E).
text: Ek chhota kadam lene se wo darr aur panic thoda control mein aa jata hai ki sab kuch ek hi din mein collapse nahi hone wala.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: har haal mein pathar ban kar khade rehna hai
text: Haan, mail chala gaya. Parents ko direct jhatka dene se pehle mujhe khud situation pe hold chahiye. Main har haal mein pathar ban kar khade rehna hai, par shayad us pathar ko bhi saans lene ki zarurat hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassured him that adapting flexibly is still part of fulfilling his responsibilities and validating his efforts.
text: Tumne apni zimmedari bohot ache se nibhayi hai, aur khud ko thoda space dena us duty ko long-term mein nibhane ke liye sabse zaroori hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided another very small, specific task to maintain momentum for tomorrow without causing overwhelm.
text: Kal ke liye ek aur chhota step consider kar sakte ho: sirf 15 minute ka timer lagakar apne latest projects ko rough points mein note down kar lena.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh feasible lag raha hai. Poora resume update karne ke baje main kal sirf points bana lunga aur LinkedIn pe connections se casually touch base karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighted his shift towards a more sustainable and structured timeframe for managing his recovery (Lens D).
text: Dheere dheere hi sahi, tum apni speed ko ek sustainable pace par la rahe ho jahan agle kuch hafte realistically plan ho sakein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, waqt toh lagega. Market slow hai aur nayi job overnight nahi milti. Par atleast ab mujhe lag raha hai ki main situation ko theek se face kar paunga, ek ek din karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the shift from deep exhaustion and panic to a quiet sense of calm acceptance and readiness.
text: Lagta hai ab andar se woh helplessness aur darr ki jagah ek quiet acceptance aa gayi hai, jo tumhe zyada grounded feel kara rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided final validation, reinforcing his inner strength and self-worth entirely independently of his financial situation.
text: Mujhe poora bharosa hai ki jis himmat se tumne ab tak sab sambhala hai, tum is challenge se bhi nikal jaoge. Tumhari aukaat aur izzat sirf tumhare account balance se decide nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari mujhe breakdown karne ki ijaazat nahi deti

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge mild risk normally + Lens B to mirror their duty frame blocking emotional space.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Use Lens C to mirror the relational element of trying to protect the family.
text: Aapke peeche jo family khadi hai, unki har basic zaroorat ko mehfooz rakhne ki koshish mein aap apna personal darr aur bechaini puri tarah ignore kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: zimmedari mujhe breakdown karne ki ijaazat nahi deti
